backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining all data types (Message, Channel, Server, Post, UserProfile, etc.) and implementing core functionality for servers, channels, messages, DMs, posts, user profiles, moderation, and blob storage with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (server browser, join dialog, message composer UX, online status, server cards) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components and pages, documenting their purpose, data hooks, props, and key implementation details for the messaging and social app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React app with a root div and references the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with five routes (Feed, Servers, Messages, Users, Profile) and wrapping the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Guard component that displays a sign-in prompt card for unauthenticated users and renders children only when authenticated via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and clearing React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/channels/Channel: Channel list component displaying server channels with create, edit, and delete functionality for owners and admins, using useGetChannels hook and handling channel selection.
frontend/src/components/channels/CreateC: Form component for creating a new channel within a server, with name input validation and success/cancel callbacks.
frontend/src/components/channels/EditCha: Dialog component for editing an existing channel's name with validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmComposer.t: Direct message composer with mention autocomplete, media attachments (upload or URL), and message sending functionality.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmThreadList: Displays a scrollable list of DM conversation threads with user avatars, names, verification badges, and last message timestamps.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmTimeline.t: Shows the message timeline for a specific DM conversation with polling, message list, and composer at the bottom.
Form with user autocomplete input to initiate a new direct message conversation with a selected user.
frontend/src/components/empty/EmptyState: Reusable empty state card component displaying an image, title, and description for empty views.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostCompose: Post creation form with text content, media attachments (upload or URL via tabs), and submission handling.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostItem.ts: Displays a single post card with author info, content, media, mentions, and delete functionality for authors/admins.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Sticky header with app logo, title, and login button, providing navigation to home.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component that renders the header, navigation, main content outlet, and profile setup modal in a responsive flex container.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppNav.ts: Navigation component that renders a desktop sidebar and mobile bottom navigation bar with links to Feed, Servers, Messages, Users, and Profile pages, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/media/Attachment: Displays a grid of uploaded image attachments with remove buttons, converting Attachment bytes to blob URLs for preview.
File upload button component that validates image files (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) under 10MB and converts them to Uint8Array attachments.
frontend/src/components/messages/Channel: Displays a scrollable list of messages for a specific channel with loading state, empty state, and a message composer at the bottom, handling delete permissions based on user role.
frontend/src/components/messages/Message: Message input form with support for text content, image attachments (upload or URL), and @mention autocomplete with keyboard navigation.
Renders a single message with author avatar, display name, timestamp, content with mention parsing, and optional delete button for authorized users.
frontend/src/components/profile/AvatarUp: Avatar upload component that validates image files under 10MB and converts them to Uint8Array attachments for profile pictures.
frontend/src/components/profile/External: Alert dialog that warns users before navigating to external URLs, displaying the destination and requiring confirmation to proceed.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: A popover component that displays user profile information including avatar, display name, verification badge, bio, join date, pronouns, and social links with visibility controls and external link safety warnings.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup that prompts authenticated users to create a profile with display name and optional avatar (via URL or upload).
frontend/src/components/profile/UserAvat: A reusable avatar component that displays user profile pictures from either uploaded attachments or URLs, with fallback to initials.
frontend/src/components/servers/CreateSe: A form component for creating new servers with name input, validation, and success/cancel callbacks.
frontend/src/components/servers/JoinServ: A dialog component that allows users to join servers either by entering an invite code or directly via server ID.
frontend/src/components/servers/manageme: Displays and manages banned users for a server, allowing owners and admins to view ban details (principal, reason, timestamp) and unban members.
Allows server owners and admins to customize server branding by uploading/setting icon and banner image URLs with preview functionality.
Provides a danger zone interface for server owners and admins to permanently delete a server with confirmation dialog requiring exact server name match.
Enables server owners and admins to edit and save the server's description and topic text fields with character limits.
Displays server invite code and generates shareable invite links with copy-to-clipboard functionality for both code and full URL.
Lists all server members with online status indicators and provides kick/ban actions for owners and admins via confirmation dialogs, preventing actions on self or server owner.
Displays the caller's role and permissions in a server, showing role hierarchy (Owner, Moderator, Member) with icons and descriptions.
Allows server owners and admins to edit the server name, with permission checks and form validation.
Main dialog for server settings with tabbed navigation between overview, invites, members, bans, roles, branding, description, and delete sections.
Layout component providing a sidebar navigation for server settings sections with icons and active state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/servers/ServerBr: A grid-based browser view displaying all available servers with join buttons and server metadata like owner and member count.
frontend/src/components/servers/ServerLi: A sidebar component displaying user's servers with create/join actions, inline editing, dropdown menus for management, and moderator visual treatments for verified users.
frontend/src/components/text/MentionText: Parses and renders @mentions in text content, converting them to interactive profile popovers with verification badges.
frontend/src/components/users/MentionPic: Dropdown autocomplete picker for selecting users to mention, with keyboard navigation and moderator badges.
frontend/src/components/users/ModeratorV: Displays a user's display name with verified badge and optional 'Verified Moderator' label for verified users.
frontend/src/components/users/OnlineStat: Shows a green dot indicator for online users (currently hardcoded to show all as online).
frontend/src/components/users/UserAutoco: Input field with dropdown autocomplete for searching and selecting users, supporting keyboard navigation.
frontend/src/components/users/VerifiedBa: Renders a blue checkmark icon to indicate verified user status.
frontend/src/constants/polling.ts: Defines polling intervals: 5 seconds for active views and 30 seconds for background updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMentionResolver.ts: React Query hook that resolves user display names to Principal IDs by searching users and finding exact matches, with 5-minute caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, servers, channels, messages, DMs, posts, and admin functions with mutations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewPollingEnabled: Hook that determines if polling should be enabled based on whether a specific route is active and the browser tab is visible.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including a separate settings theme palette.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DirectMessagesPage.ts: Page component for direct messaging with a sidebar showing conversation threads and a main area displaying the selected DM timeline, including a form to start new conversations.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Global feed page displaying all posts with a post composer at the top, loading states, and empty state handling with view-based polling.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSettingsPage.t: Profile settings page allowing users to edit display name, avatar (URL or upload), bio, pronouns, links, and background theme, with granular field visibility controls (public/private) and principal ID display toggle.
frontend/src/pages/ServersPage.tsx: Main servers page with tabbed interface for 'My Servers' and 'Discover' views, displaying server list, channel list, and channel timeline in a three-column layout with management dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/UserDiscoveryPage.tsx: User search and discovery page with search input filtering by username, display name, pronouns, or links, displaying results with avatar, moderator badges, and profile popovers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, extended theme with animations, typography, and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Discord-like app features including server browsing, invite codes, and known issue with actor.createChannel function blocking channel creation.
